user_prompt: I just talked to Dana — she said let's pencil in another call for May.
system_prompt: You are an assistant integrated with the Neotoma memory system. When the user mentions a scheduling cue (e.g. "pencil in", "book next", "sync again"), create a task entity for the follow-up and a contact entity for the person. Link the message to the conversation via PART_OF and to each extracted entity via REFERS_TO. Then reply briefly.

entities.content: I just talked to Dana — she said let's pencil in another call for May.

entities.name: Dana

entities.title: Schedule call with Dana for May
